name: orchestrator-code
description: Task orchestrator that routes coding work to persistent Claude Code or Codex sessions with Groq, local and cloud fallback routing.

commands.title: Orchestrator: Set Ollama Cloud API Key
Orchestrator: Sync MCP Servers to Claude & Codex
Orchestrator: Scan Project into Code Graph

orchestratorCode.groqModel.description: Groq model used to classify tasks between Claude and Codex. Quota, transient and malformed-generation failures fall back to local Ollama, then Ollama Cloud.

orchestratorCode.ollamaBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the local Ollama server used when Groq routing is quota-limited or cannot produce a valid decision.

orchestratorCode.ollamaModel.description: Local Ollama model used as the Groq routing fallback.

orchestratorCode.ollamaCloudBaseUrl.description: Ollama Cloud host used when Groq routing fails and local Ollama is unavailable.

orchestratorCode.ollamaCloudModel.description: Ollama Cloud model used as the final routing fallback. Configure its API key with the command palette.

orchestratorCode.claudeCommand.description: Command used to invoke the Claude Code CLI.

orchestratorCode.codexCommand.description: Custom Codex CLI command. The default uses the CLI version bundled with @openai/codex-sdk when available.

orchestratorCode.delegateBridgeNodeComma.description: Node executable Codex uses to launch the local 'delegate_to_claude' bridge tool (lets a Codex-led turn hand a subtask to Claude, e.g. for machine-control actions). Must resolve on Codex's own PATH, not just this extension's. Set to an absolute node path if Codex can't find 'node'.

orchestratorCode.claudeModelAllowlist.description: Claude model ids/aliases allowed for delegated work. The provider default is preferred; the safe list excludes credit-only models. Empty allows every model reported by the authenticated account.

orchestratorCode.codexModelAllowlist.description: Codex model ids allowed for delegated work. The provider default is preferred. Empty allows every visible model reported by Codex App Server.

orchestratorCode.mcpServers.description: Names of MCP servers (already configured in Claude Code's global config) to mirror into this workspace for both Claude and Codex.
